linkedin_profile.headline: Assistant General Manager at The Ampersand Hotel
linkedin_profile.about: Experienced hotel manager with sound leadership skills who proactively can lead a large dynamic team with a customer focused ethos. A great eye for detail and being highly organised has contributed to my successes in Hospitality. My true passion is being able to impact both customer and team experiences, being able to personalise their experiences from beginning to end. I enjoy calling London my home, and is now seeking new opportunities within Hospitality and Property management, in this great city.

experience.title: Guest Services Manager
experience.description: Part of the team who set up the Andaz concept. The first hotel to operate without a reception desk and being able process arrival and departures via iPads. Develop the role of the Andaz Host, a personal contact who preform the role of reception, concierges, porter and guest relation in one. Great Eastern Hotel (2002-2007) Supervise and coordinate the daily Front desk operation (days and nights) including guest service follow up. Overall responsible for daily hotel fire and evacuation procedures. Introduced an Induction, Training & Development structure that improve operational efficiencies. Including building a system that would link all team members to a coach. Overseeing door hosting and registration of guest attending various parties, events and art installations.

experience.title: Assistant Front Office Manager

experience.title: Front Office Manager

Implementing of the Guest experience management role and systems to deliver a unique and personal service that would again set the Andaz brand apart. Building an action and goal focused management team. Create a training and development structure that focus on lateral growth and succession planning to reduce turnover. Operating a Health Club that includes a range of services from Personal training, Memberships, Physiotherapy and Beauty treatments. Driving revenues on all services including product sales and promotions.

linkedin_profile.headline: Portfolio Revenue Manager - IHG Revenue Services
linkedin_profile.about: Fluent in German, Dutch, English, and Hindi, I thrive in diverse, multicultural environments and enjoy contributing to global hospitality operations. My international upbringing and language skills have allowed me to collaborate seamlessly with cross-functional teams and stakeholders across regions. As a graduate of Les Roches International School of Hotel Management, I bring a solid foundation in hospitality with a strong focus on data-driven decision-making. My approach blends academic knowledge with real-world experience—leveraging analytics, forecasting, and a customer-centric mindset to drive revenue growth and optimize performance. I’m passionate about using insights to create strategies that not only boost profitability but also enhance the guest experience.
